title: Best Paper Award at CHI 2026
description: The paper 'Sex after Cancer: Co-Designing Bespoke Care Technologies for Post-Cancer Bodies' received the Best Paper Award at CHI 2026.

title: Panel at CHI 2026
description: I co-organise the panel 'Participatory AI & Social Justice' at CHI 2026.

title: Meet-up at CHI 2026
description: I co-organised the Meet-up 'Disability, Differences, and Diversity: Revisiting Inclusive Design and Access' CHI 2026.

title: Paper at CHI 2026
description: New paper 'Self-management for Chronic Illness: A Scoping Review on Designing Virtual Assistants for Patient-Centered Care' at CHI 2026.

title: Paper at CHI 2026
description: New paper 'Entangled Life and Code: A Computational Design Taxonomy for Synergistic Bio-Digital Systems ' at CHI 2026.

title: Paper at CHI 2026
description: New paper 'Are Compliments Bad Now? Comparing LLMs and Human Interpretations of Gender Microaggressions in the Workplace' at CHI 2026.

title: Paper at CHI 2026
description: New paper 'A Taxonomy of Design Futures Processes for Ethical Reflection on Technologies' at CHI 2026.

title: Di Yan Defends PhD Dissertation

title: Paper at DIS 2025
description: New paper 'From Bodily Functions to Bodily Fun: Approaching Pleasure as a Process when Designing with Sexual Experiences' at DIS 2025.

title: Paper at CSCW 2025
description: New paper 'Safeguarding Crowdsourcing Surveys from ChatGPT through Prompt Injection' at CSCW 2025.

title: Best Paper Award at CHI 2025
description: The paper '(Re)discovering Sexual Pleasure after Cancer: Understanding the Design Space' received the Best Paper Award at CHI 2025.
